title: Order dated 13.08.2013 - Transfer of cases under the jurisdiction of Western Zone of the NGT to the NGT, Western Zone Bench at Pune w.e.f. 25th of August, 2013
description: Order dated 13.08.2013 - Transfer of cases under the jurisdiction of Western Zone of the NGT to the NGT, Western Zone Bench at Pune w.e.f. 25th of August, 2013
text: NATIONAL GREEN TRIBUNAL PRINCIPAL BENCH NEW DELHI ORDER File No. : NGT(PBI/23/'1.012j /It) , Dated : 12l""August, 201~ WHEREAS, in exercise of powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 4 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 (19th of 2010), the Central Government has specified Pune as the ordinary place of sitting of the National Green Tribunal Western Zone Bench which shall exercise jurisdiction in the areal territorial jurisdiction of Maharashtra, Gujarat, Goa, with Union Territories of Daman, Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli, vide Notification No. 5.0. 1908 (E) dated 17.08.2011. WHEREAS, in exercise of powers conferred upon the Chairperson, National Green Tribunal, under Clause (d) of Sub-Section (4) of Section-4 of the National Green Tribunal Act, 2010 read with sub-rules (1) & (2) of Rule 3 of the National Green Tribunal (Practices and Procedure) Rules, 2011, Western Zone Bench of the National Green Tribunal at Pune to deal with the cases relating to the Western Zone has been constituted. Now, pursuant to above order, all the cases under the jurisdiction of Western Zone of the National Green Tribunal are hereby transferred to the National Green Tribunal, Western Zone Bench at Pune, having jurisdiction in the area/territorial jurisdiction of Maharashtra, Gujarat, Goa, with Union Territories of Daman, Diu and Dadra and Nagar Haveli, to be heard with effect from 25th of August, 2013. airperson onal Green Tribunal -- 1 of 1 --
